title: SyncTask source identity snapshot and guided UUID update
tldr: Keep UUID source tokens as the runtime contract, persist extra removable-media identity hints beside each task, and offer conservative user-approved UUID update recommendations when a stored UUID no longer resolves.

title: Live dry-run session reentry and terminal immutability
tldr: Treat live dry-run sessions as task-scoped UI state, keep terminal sessions immutable against late events, and expose MCP-origin dry-run sessions through task-button reentry instead of auto-navigation.

title: Target path preflight and missing-target policy
tldr: Classify missing target paths before dry-run and sync, fail fast for unmounted target volumes, and treat missing mounted subdirectories as create-on-sync with explicit user-facing warnings.

title: Exclusion defaults consolidation into a program set
tldr: Replace per-ecosystem built-in exclusion defaults with one `program` built-in set, automatically migrate legacy built-in IDs in stored exclusion sets and tasks, and remove `.gitignore` from the `git` built-in set.

title: Launch-at-login autostart with hidden startup
tldr: Use Tauri's autostart plugin on macOS, keep login-item state as the OS-owned source of truth, and start hidden only when both the autostart argument and OS login-item state confirm a real login launch.

title: Enabled-only MCP relay for a running-app control plane
tldr: Expose a local stdio MCP relay only when the user explicitly enables MCP in SyncWatcher settings, and route all MCP actions through the running app backend over a Unix socket with backend-owned canonical config.

title: Release SBOMs, checksum manifests, stable cosign attestation, and separate local verification
tldr: Generate SBOMs and checksum manifests for every tagged release, force keyless cosign attestations for stable tags, keep prerelease attestation opt-in via a repo variable, and keep local cosign verification separate from the latest installer.

title: watchMode zero-copy auto-unmount deferred confirmation
tldr: When watch sync copies zero files, replace immediate auto-unmount with notification + deferred in-app confirmation, and unmount only after explicit approval.

title: Exclusion template expansion and exclusion-pattern limit increase
tldr: Expand default exclusion templates across major ecosystems, merge missing defaults for existing users once, and raise exclusion-pattern limit from 100 to 300 with runtime deduplication.

title: Target-newer conflict hash-equivalence exception
tldr: When target mtime is newer, classify as conflict only if content differs; if source and target are hash-identical, treat as no-op.

title: Target-newer conflict deferred review in dedicated window
tldr: When target files are newer than source, skip auto-copy and defer handling to an explicit review session in a separate conflict-review window.

title: Runtime watch-mode initial sync queue and concurrency limit
tldr: Runtime watch sync uses a bounded queue (max parallelism 2), coalesces watch events during active sync into one replay, and serializes overlapping runtime config applies.

title: Sync task target conflict policy, UUID runtime validation, and orphan cleanup workflow
tldr: Remove automatic target-side deletion, enforce source/target overlap constraints at runtime (including UUID sources), and replace deletion with explicit orphan scan and confirmed manual cleanup.

title: App lifecycle (quit vs background)
tldr: Keep window-close behavior stable under `closeAction`, add source-aware close events, and apply Cmd+Q-only confirmation policies.

title: Dashboard volume source of truth
tldr: Stop scanning `/Volumes`; use `getmntinfo_r_np` as source of truth, and apply a single app-wide capacity unit policy (default binary/IEC).
